notes: Algeria were without key striker Mohamed Amoura (hamstring injury sustained vs Argentina), their top scorer in World Cup qualifying, making Mahrez and Gouiri the focal attacking threats; Austria had no confirmed absences, though Arnautovic started only after consecutive substitute appearances, and Alaba (returning from a knee injury) was a late fitness monitor.
